title: Precious Ores(Sapphire)
description:
Discover shimmering sapphire deep underground – craft powerful tools from this rare gem!
now available for forge!
body:
# 💎 Precious Ore (Forge)

Adds a brand-new **Sapphire Ore** to Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge)! Mine, craft, and upgrade with this brilliant blue gem.

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/106320e5a6839d65d44a7452d3a7741ed3366693.png)


## 🌟 Features
- 🌌 **Sapphire Ore** generates naturally in the overworld
- 🔥 Smelt ore into **Sapphire Gems**
- 🛠️ Craft new **Sapphire Tools** – stronger than iron, slightly below diamond
- 🎨 Custom textures, models, and smooth integration with vanilla gameplay

---

## 🧩 Compatibility
- ✅ Minecraft **1.20.1**
- ✅ Forge mod loader only
- ❌ fabric not available
---

## 📦 Dependencies
- [Forge Mod Loader](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/)

---

## 📚 How to Install
1. Install **Minecraft Forge 1.20.1**
2. Drop the `Precious-Ore.jar` into your `mods` folder
3. Launch Minecraft and start mining!

---

## 🛠 Future Plans
- 💠 Add Sapphire Armor
- ⚔️ Unique tool abilities and enchantment boosts

---

## 💬 Credits
- Mod by **NASSER**
- Textures by **NASSER**

---

## 📄 License
This mod is licensed under the **MIT License** – free to use, modify, and include in modpacks (with credit).

---

💙 *Bring a fresh sparkle to your underground adventures – start mining Sapphire today!*
